creator: teru-sama@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 234727
Diff that enables static linking in the libunistring port

In the port Makefile (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/devel/libunistring/Makefile), line 19 disables the building of the static library. I don't know if this is intended behavior, but I have made a diff that fixes this.
